title: Picking Up a Prescription
description: At the pharmacy counter — give your details, ask about side effects, pay.

templates.text: Yes, the name is Chang. C-H-A-N-G.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Got it. Date of birth, please?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Two items today. Take one tablet a day with food. Any questions?

templates.text: Are there any common side effects I should watch for?
templates.hint_zh: 有什麼常見副作用我要注意?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sometimes a mild headache or upset stomach. If it lasts more than a few days, call us.

templates.text: Got it. How much do I owe?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Twelve fifty after insurance. Card or cash?

templates.text: Card, please. Thanks for your help.
